debug_info.goal:
d : Type u_4
inst✝¹ : Fintype d
inst✝ : DecidableEq d
ρ : MState d
ψ : Ket d
⊢ ρ.exp_val ↑(MState.pure ψ) = 1 ↔ ρ = MState.pure ψ

failed_attempts:
have h0 : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = 1 ↔ ρ = pure ψ := by
    constructor
    · intro h
      have h₁ : ρ = pure ψ := by
        have h₂ : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = 1 := h
        have h₃ : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = (ψ •∗ ψ).exp_val ρ := by
          simp [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.exp_val_eq_mtrace, Matrix.mul_assoc, Matrix.trace_mul_comm]
          <;>
          rw [← Matrix.algebraMap_apply]
          <;>
          simp [Ket.mulVec, Matrix.mul_assoc, Matrix.trace_mul_comm]
          <;>
          congr 1 <;>
          ext <;>
          simp [Coe.add, Coe.smul, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          simp_all [Ket.coe_add, Ket.coe_smul]
          <;>
          field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.normSq]
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.normSq]
          <;>
          linarith
        rw [h₃] at h₂
        have h₄ : (ψ •∗ ψ).exp_val ρ = 1 := h₂
        have h₅ : (ψ •∗ ψ).exp_val ρ = (ψ •∗ ψ).exp_val ρ := rfl
        have h₆ : ρ = pure ψ := by
          -- Use the fact that the expectation value of ψ•∗ψ with respect to ρ is 1 to deduce that ρ = pure ψ
          apply Eq.symm
          apply Eq.symm
          calc
            ρ = ρ := rfl
            _ = pure ψ := by
              -- Use the fact that the expectation value of ψ•∗ψ with respect to ρ is 1 to deduce that ρ = pure ψ
              have h₇ : ρ = pure ψ := by
                -- Use the fact that the expectation value of ψ•∗ψ with respect to ρ is 1 to deduce that ρ = pure ψ
                apply Eq.symm
                apply Eq.symm
                have h₈ : ρ = pure ψ := by
                  -- Use the fact that the expectation value of ψ•∗ψ with respect to ρ is 1 to deduce that ρ = pure ψ
                  calc
                    ρ = (pure ψ : MState d) := by
                      -- Use the fact that the expectation value of ψ•∗ψ with respect to ρ is 1 to deduce that ρ = pure ψ
                      apply MState.ext
                      intro i j
                      have h₉ := congr_arg (fun ρ : MState d => ρ.val i j) h₄
                      simp [MState.exp_val, Matrix.exp_val_eq_trace_mul, Hermitian, MState.mk, Matrix.one_apply,
                        Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.trace, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin,
                        Finset.sum_ite_eq'] at h₉
                      simp_all [MState.mk, Ket.comp, Ket.val, Matrix.mul_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq',
                        Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
                      <;>
                      ring_nf at * <;>
                      simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two] <;>
                      nlinarith
                    _ = (pure ψ : MState d) := by rfl
                exact h₈
              exact h₇
        exact h₆
      exact h₁
    · intro h
      have h₁ : ρ = pure ψ := h
      have h₂ : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = 1 := by
        rw [h₁]
        simp [MState.exp_val, Matrix.exp_val_eq_trace_mul, Hermitian, MState.mk, Matrix.one_apply, Matrix.mul_apply,
          Matrix.trace, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, Finset.sum_ite_eq']
        <;>
        simp [Ket.comp, Ket.val, Matrix.mul_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq', Finset.sum_const,
          Finset.card_fin, Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;>
        linarith
      exact h₂
  exact h0

constructor <;> intro h <;> simp_all [exp_val]
  <;>
  (try { contradiction }) <;>
  (try {
    have h₁ : ρ = MState.pure ψ := by
      apply MState.ext
      <;>
      simp_all [MState.ext_iff, MState.pure, Matrix.diagMap]
      <;>
      (try { norm_num at * }) <;>
      (try { aesop }) <;>
      (try {
        have h₂ := congr_fun (congr_fun (Classical.decEq (d : Type))
          (Kets.get ψ 0))
          0)
        <;>
        simp_all [Ket.get]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
      })
      <;>
      (try {
        have h₂ := congr_fun (congr_fun (Classical.decEq (d : Type))
          (Kets.get ψ 1))
          0)
        <;>
        simp_all [Ket.get]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
      })
      <;>
      aesop
    exact h₁
  }) <;>
  (try { aesop })

constructor <;> intro h <;>
    (try cases ρ <;> cases ψ <;> simp_all [MState.exp_val, MState.norm_eq_one]) <;>
    (try simp_all [HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, Finset.sum_eq_one_iff_of_nonneg]) <;>
    (try field_simp [Ket.norm_eq_one] at h ⊢) <;>
    (try ring_nf at h ⊢) <;>
    (try norm_cast at h ⊢) <;>
    (try
      {
        apply MState.ext
        intro i j
        simp_all [Matrix.mul_apply, Finset.sum_eq_one_iff_of_nonneg]
        <;>
        (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [Ket.norm_eq_one] <;> nlinarith)
        <;>
        (try
          {
            have h₁ := h
            simp [Finset.sum_eq_one_iff_of_nonneg] at h₁ ⊢
            <;>
            (try
              {
                have h₂ := h₁
                simp_all [Ket.norm_eq_one]
                <;> nlinarith
              })
          })
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        exfalso
        simp_all [MState.exp_val, MState.norm_eq_one]
        <;>
        (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [Ket.norm_eq_one] <;> nlinarith)
      })
  <;>
  (try aesop)

have h₁ : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = 1 ↔ ρ = pure ψ := by
    have h₂ : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = 1 ↔ ρ = pure ψ := by
      constructor
      · intro h
        have h₃ : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = 1 := h
        have h₄ : ρ = pure ψ := by
          -- Use the property of trace to show that the states are equal if their trace is 1
          have h₅ : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = 1 := h₃
          have h₆ : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = ρ.trace * (pure ψ).trace := by
            simp [MState.exp_val_pure]
            <;>
            simp [MState.trace_pure]
          have h₇ : ρ.trace * (pure ψ).trace = 1 := by
            linarith
          have h₈ : ρ.trace = 1 := by
            have h₉ : (pure ψ).trace = 1 := by
              simp [MState.trace_pure]
              <;>
              simp [Ket.norm_one]
            have h₁₀ : ρ.trace ≤ 1 := by
              have h₁₁ : ρ.trace ≤ 1 := by
                -- The trace of a state is at most 1
                have h₁₂ : ρ.trace ≤ 1 := by
                  -- Use the fact that the trace of a state is ≤ 1
                  exact MState.trace_le_one ρ
                exact h₁₂
              exact h₁₁
            have h₁₁ : ρ.trace * (pure ψ).trace = 1 := by
              linarith
            have h₁₂ : (pure ψ).trace = 1 := by
              simp [MState.trace_pure]
              <;>
              simp [Ket.norm_one]
            have h₁₃ : ρ.trace = 1 := by
              nlinarith
            exact h₁₃
          have h₉ : ρ = pure ψ := by
            -- Use the property of trace to show that the states are equal if their trace is 1
            have h₁₀ : ρ.trace = 1 := h₈
            have h₁₁ : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = 1 := h₃
            have h₁₂ : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = ρ.trace * (pure ψ).trace := by
              simp [MState.exp_val_pure]
              <;>
              simp [MState.trace_pure]
            have h₁₃ : ρ.trace * (pure ψ).trace = 1 := by
              linarith
            have h₁₄ : (pure ψ).trace = 1 := by
              simp [MState.trace_pure]
              <;>
              simp [Ket.norm_one]
            have h₁₅ : ρ = pure ψ := by
              -- Use the fact that the traces are equal and the matrices are positive semidefinite
              apply MState.ext
              intro i j
              have h₁₆ := ρ.2
              have h₁₇ := (pure ψ).2
              have h₁₈ := ρ.exp_val_pure_eq_one_iff (pure ψ)
              simp_all [MState.exp_val_pure]
              <;>
              simp_all [Matrix.mul_apply, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
              <;>
              norm_num
              <;>
              aesop
            exact h₁₅
          exact h₉
        exact h₄
      · intro h
        have h₃ : ρ = pure ψ := h
        have h₄ : ρ.exp_val (pure ψ) = 1 := by
          rw [h₃]
          simp [MState.exp_val_pure]
          <;>
          simp [MState.trace_pure]
          <;>
          simp [Ket.norm_one]
        exact h₄
    exact h₂
  exact h₁
  <;>
  simp_all [MState.exp_val_pure]
  <;>
  simp_all [MState.trace_pure]
  <;>
  simp_all [Ket.norm_one]
  <;>
  linarith

simp [MState.exp_val, MState.pure_def]

  (try

      (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]) <;>

    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      ext i j
      have h₁ := congr_arg (fun x => x i j) ‹_›
      simp_all [Matrix.one_apply, Matrix.mul_apply, Finset.sum_eq_single, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_comm]
